metadata.title: Sneaky Flank Leads to a Clean Double Kill on VALORANT B Site
metadata.description:
Check out this quick flank that caught the enemies off guard on B site. Timing and positioning really made the difference here.
What’s your favorite way to surprise opponents in VALORANT?
Drop your clutch moments in the comments!

Share your best flank plays in the comments below!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
